---
title: "推薦系統程式實作"
author: "Li"
format:
 pdf:
    engine: xelatex
    documentclass: article
    geometry: "left=2cm, right=2cm, top=2cm, bottom=2cm, a4paper"
    fontsize: 12pt
    header-includes:
      - \usepackage{xeCJK}
      - \setCJKmainfont{Microsoft JhengHei UI}
editor: visual
---

```{r,message=FALSE,warning=FALSE}
library(showtext)
showtext_auto()  # 啟用 showtext
font_add("Microsoft JhengHei UI", "C:/Windows/Fonts/msjh.ttc")  # 添加你使用的字體
```

# 載入套件與資料集
```{r,message=FALSE,warning=FALSE}
library(ggplot2) 
library(tidyr)  
library(recommenderlab)
data("MovieLense")
```

# 壹、探索性資料分析 (EDA)
```{r}
# 1. 檢視資料集維度
print(dim(MovieLense))

# 2. 評分分佈直方圖
ratings_vector <- getRatings(MovieLense)
barplot(table(ratings_vector), 
     main = "MovieLens 100k：使用者評分分佈圖", 
     xlab = "星等 (1~5分)", ylab = "評分數量",
     col = "steelblue")

# 3. 評分矩陣熱力圖 (觀察資料稀疏性)
image(MovieLense[1:200,1:200], 
      main = "評分矩陣熱力圖 (驗證資料稀疏性)",
      ylab = "使用者 (Users)", xlab = "電影 (Movies)")
```

# 貳、四種演算法比較
```{r}
# 1. 建立實驗設計 (80% 訓練集，給定 15 筆，>=4 分視為喜歡)
set.seed(2026)
scheme_rating <- evaluationScheme(MovieLense, method="split",
                                  train=0.8, given=15, goodRating=4)

# 2. 定義比較模型清單
algorithms <- list(
  "Random"               = list(name="RANDOM", param=NULL),
  "Popular"              = list(name="POPULAR", param=NULL),
  "UBCF"                 = list(name="UBCF",param=list(method="Cosine")),
  "Matrix_Factorization" = list(name="SVDF", param=list(k=10))
)

# 3. 計算預測誤差 (RMSE, MSE, MAE)
results_rating <- evaluate(scheme_rating, algorithms, type="ratings")

# 提取各模型的 RMSE 結果並合併成表格 
eval_rmse_results <- do.call(rbind, lapply(results_rating, function(x) avg(x)))
print(eval_rmse_results)

# 4. 計算 Top-N 推薦指標 (Precision, Recall, ROC)
results_topN <- evaluate(scheme_rating, algorithms, n=c(1, 5, 10, 15),
                         type="topNList")

# Top-n 的 Precision 與 Recall 數值(confusion matrix)
avg(results_topN)

# 5. 繪製 ROC 與 Precision-Recall 曲線
plot(results_topN, annotate = c(1, 3), legend="topleft", main="ROC 曲線")
plot(results_topN, "prec/rec", annotate = 3, legend="topright",
     main="Precision-Recall 曲線")
```

# 參、綜合比較長條圖 (RMSE, Precision, Recall)
```{r}
# 1. 指定提取 Top-10 的推薦表現
top_n_val <- 3 #(第3個是top-10)

# 2. 整理最終繪圖資料框
final_metrics <- data.frame(
  Model = c("Random","Popular", "UBCF", "Matrix_Factorization"),
  
  RMSE = eval_rmse_results[, "RMSE"],
  
  Precision = c(
    avg(results_topN)[["Random"]][top_n_val, "precision"],
    avg(results_topN)[["Popular"]][top_n_val, "precision"],
    avg(results_topN)[["UBCF"]][top_n_val, "precision"],
    avg(results_topN)[["Matrix_Factorization"]][top_n_val, "precision"]
  ),
  
  Recall = c(
    avg(results_topN)[["Random"]][top_n_val, "recall"],
    avg(results_topN)[["Popular"]][top_n_val, "recall"],
    avg(results_topN)[["UBCF"]][top_n_val, "recall"],
    avg(results_topN)[["Matrix_Factorization"]][top_n_val, "recall"]
  )
)
print(final_metrics)

# 3. 資料轉換
metrics_long <- pivot_longer(final_metrics, 
                             cols = c(RMSE, Precision, Recall), 
                             names_to = "Metric", 
                             values_to = "Value")

# 設定 X 軸與分面圖的顯示順序
metrics_long$Model <- factor(metrics_long$Model,
                      levels = c("Random","Popular", "UBCF", "Matrix_Factorization"))
metrics_long$Metric <- factor(metrics_long$Metric,
                              levels = c("RMSE", "Precision", "Recall"))

# 4. 繪製分面長條圖
ggplot(metrics_long, aes(x = Model, y = Value, fill = Model)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black", width = 0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~ Metric, scales = "free_y") + 
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") + 
  theme_bw() + 
  
  labs(title = "推薦演算法綜合指標比較",
       subtitle = "RMSE：越低越好 │ Precision & Recall：越高越好",
       x = "推薦模型", y = "指標數值") +

  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 11, face = "bold"),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"), 
        legend.position = "none") 
```
